videos.video_subject: Why Vinicius Junior is impossible to stop - the most fouled player in Europe whose only weakness is that defenders have to kick him to win the ball
videos.video_script: Defenders have basically given up trying to tackle this man fairly. Vinicius Junior gets fouled more than any other player in Europe. He will dance past three defenders with a single touch, so they just take him down instead. He scored the winning goal in a Champions League final and made it look effortless. Referees almost need extra cards just for the players chasing him. The only way to stop Vinicius Junior is to foul him. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Vinicius Junior dribbling past defenders, Vinicius Junior skills slow motion, Vinicius Junior fouled by defenders, Vinicius Junior Real Madrid goal celebration, Vinicius Junior Champions League final goal, Vinicius Junior in a white Real Madrid jersey, Vinicius Junior nutmeg elastico, Vinicius Junior Brazil yellow jersey, Vinicius Junior beating a defender one on one, Vinicius Junior close up face
